examples: Continuing violence will retard negotiations over the country's future.
It would be a pity to retard our development by holding back those people who are gifted enough to work and play well with less than the average amount of sleep, if indeed it does them no harm.
Others are spraying them with a chemical to retard growth.
The process can also retard spoilage, and it doesn't affect the taste of the food.
Standards may retard progress if they come too prematurely, but ultimately they can super-charge growth.
